title: Supplementaries 3D Iron Gates
body:
# Overview

This resourcepack makes [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) iron gates 3D.

For vanilla 3D iron bars, please download it from [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) in the 3D section.

![3D Iron Gate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OjYGrt4q/images/a43155489321426ec9fb40488ac3ec5e484d1d17.webp)

Check out similar projects here: https://modrinth.com/collection/N35iau5q

# Credits
- [Stridey](https://modrinth.com/user/31j7L936) and Vanilla Tweaks for the inspiration from their vanilla 3D iron bars
- Supplementaries: https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries
